VOXCHRONICLE.Title: VoxChronicle
VOXCHRONICLE.Description: Auto-transcribe RPG sessions and publish chronicles to Kanka with AI-generated content and portraits.

Settings.OpenAIKeyHint: Your OpenAI API key for transcription and image generation. Get one at platform.openai.com
Settings.KankaTokenHint: Your Kanka personal access token. Generate at app.kanka.io/settings/api
Settings.KankaCampaignHint: The numeric ID of your Kanka campaign (found in the campaign URL)
Settings.LanguageHint: Specify language for improved transcription accuracy, or leave on auto-detect
Settings.TranscriptionModeHint: Choose between cloud API, local Whisper backend, or automatic selection
Settings.TranscriptionModeAuto: Auto (try local first, fallback to API)
Settings.WhisperBackendUrlHint: URL of your local whisper.cpp server (default: http://localhost:8080)
Settings.ShowTranscriptionModeIndicatorHint: Display the current transcription mode in the recorder UI
Settings.AudioSourceHint: Choose where to capture audio from during recording
Settings.AudioSourceAuto: Automatic (try Foundry VTT first, then microphone)
Settings.EchoCancellationHint: Enable echo cancellation for clearer recordings
Settings.NoiseSuppressionHint: Enable noise suppression to reduce background noise
Settings.ImageQualityHint: Quality setting for DALL-E 3 generated images (HD costs more)
Settings.MaxImagesHint: Maximum number of AI-generated images per session (0 to disable)
Settings.AutoExtractHint: Automatically extract NPCs, locations, and items from transcriptions
Settings.ConfirmEntitiesHint: Show preview dialog before creating entities in Kanka
Settings.AutoExtractRelationshipsHint: Automatically detect relationships between entities from transcriptions
Settings.RelationshipConfidenceThresholdHint: Minimum confidence score (1-10) for detected relationships to be included
Settings.MaxRelationshipsHint: Maximum number of relationships to extract per session (0 to disable)
Settings.SpeakerLabelsHint: Map speaker IDs to player names for transcription
Settings.SpeakerLabelingHint: Assign player names to detected speaker voices

Validation.OpenAIKeyNotConfigured: OpenAI API key is not configured.
Validation.OpenAIKeyInvalid: Invalid OpenAI API key. Please check your settings.
Validation.KankaTokenNotConfigured: Kanka API token or campaign ID is not configured.
Validation.KankaTokenInvalid: Invalid Kanka API token. Please check your settings.

Recorder.MicrophoneAccessRequired: Microphone access is required for recording.
Recorder.MicrophoneAccessDenied: Microphone access was denied. Please grant permission in your browser settings.
Recorder.NoAudioSupport: Your browser does not support audio recording.
Recorder.ModeTooltipAPI: Using OpenAI cloud service for transcription
Recorder.ModeTooltipLocal: Using local Whisper backend for offline transcription
Recorder.ModeTooltipAuto: Automatic mode (tries local first, falls back to API)

Transcription.Title: Transcription
Transcription.NoSpeech: No speech detected in the recording

SpeakerLabeling.Title: Speaker Labeling
SpeakerLabeling.Description: Assign names to the speakers detected in the transcription. These labels will be used in the session chronicle.
SpeakerLabeling.NoSpeakersDetected: No speakers detected yet. Record a session first.
SpeakerLabeling.ResetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all speaker labels?
SpeakerLabeling.NoGameUsers: No game users available for auto-detection
SpeakerLabeling.HelpSpeakerIds: These are automatically assigned by the transcription service (SPEAKER_00, SPEAKER_01, etc.).
SpeakerLabeling.HelpKnownSpeakers: Speakers with a {icon} icon were detected in a previous transcription session.
SpeakerLabeling.HelpQuickAssign: Use the dropdown to quickly assign a game user's name to a speaker slot.
SpeakerLabeling.HelpAutoDetect: Automatically fills empty speaker slots with game user names in order.

Vocabulary.Title: Vocabulary Manager
Vocabulary.Description: Manage custom vocabulary terms to improve transcription accuracy for your campaign.
Vocabulary.CategoryCharactersDesc: NPC and character names from your campaign
Vocabulary.CategoryLocationsDesc: Cities, dungeons, and places in your world
Vocabulary.CategoryTermsDesc: Spells, abilities, creatures, and game-specific terminology
Vocabulary.CategoryCustomDesc: Any other terms specific to your campaign
Vocabulary.ConfirmClearCategory: Are you sure you want to clear all terms in this category?
Vocabulary.ConfirmClearAll: Are you sure you want to clear all vocabulary terms?
Vocabulary.NoSuggestions: No actors or items found in your world

EntityExtraction.Title: Entity Extraction
EntityExtraction.NoEntitiesFound: No new entities found in the transcription

EntityPreview.Title: Review Extracted Entities
EntityPreview.Description: Review the entities extracted from your session. Select which ones to create in Kanka.
EntityPreview.RelationshipsDescription: Select which relationships to create in Kanka. Relationships will only be created if both entities are selected.
EntityPreview.Name: Name

Chronicle.Title: Session Chronicle
Chronicle.ConfirmDiscard: Are you sure you want to discard this session? This cannot be undone.

Errors.Generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
Errors.NetworkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
Errors.ApiKeyMissing: API key is missing. Please configure it in module settings.
Errors.ApiKeyInvalid: API key is invalid. Please check your settings.
Errors.RateLimited: Rate limited. Please wait before making more requests.
Errors.QuotaExceeded: API quota exceeded. Please check your account limits.
Errors.AudioTooLong: Audio recording exceeds the maximum length. Please record shorter sessions.
Errors.AudioTooLarge: Audio file exceeds the 25MB limit. The file will be split into chunks.

Notifications.ConfigurationIncomplete: VoxChronicle: Please configure your API keys in module settings
Notifications.ApiKeyUpdated: API key updated. Services will be re-initialized.

Help.Title: VoxChronicle Help
Help.GettingStartedText:
1. Configure your OpenAI API key and Kanka credentials in module settings.
2. Start a recording session using the record button.
3. After your session, stop the recording and transcribe it.
4. Review extracted entities and publish to Kanka.
Help.ApiKeysText: You need an OpenAI API key (for transcription and images) and a Kanka API token (for publishing). Both are required for full functionality.
Help.CostsText: OpenAI transcription costs $0.006/minute. DALL-E 3 images cost $0.04 (standard) or $0.08 (HD) per image.
Help.SupportText: For issues and feature requests, please visit our GitHub repository.
